reviews.comment:
Un desastre, venimos viajando y el autoservicio cerrado, nos dijeron que el que atiende fue al baño, una hora esperando y nunca vino, se juntó gente mientras esperamos y al final nos fuimos, una vergüenza

(Translated by Google)
A disaster. We were traveling and the drive-thru was closed. They told us the attendant had gone to the bathroom. We waited an hour and he never came back. People gathered while we waited and in the end we left. A disgrace.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURNbE9iQVZREAE
